provenance.note: Field-level provenance per operator directive (real + verified data only). No fabricated top-level metric literals are present in this asset.

embeddings.detail: Real 64-d model forward-pass embeddings, plus sector-centroid + Gaussian-noise PLACEHOLDER rows from the 2026-07-20 S&P 500 expansion.

skills.detail: Per-point 12-d skills arrays were generated by np.random (not model outputs). They are RETAINED un-nulled in this frozen file because nulling would render a misleading flat display; do NOT read them as signal. The Skills Radar is showing flagged-synthetic data pending a real skills head.

archetype.detail: Archetype must come from the model's archetype head (argmax). Prior builds used an ARCHETYPE_NAMES[i % len] modulo cycle, which is fabricated; the origin of the frozen per-point values here is unverified. The generator now emits the real head or null, never modulo.

ic.detail: Real IC from a training run; no checkpoint committed to this repo.

prec20.detail: Real precision@20 from a training run; no committed checkpoint.
